claimText: Tsinghua University requires teachers and students to disclose their use of AI and AI-generated content in accordance with regulations, as part of the 'compliance and integrity' principle.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 「合规诚信」原则要求师生对人工智能使用情况及生成内容依规进行披露声明，严禁学术不端。

citation.citationTitle: 【深改进行时】《清华大学人工智能教育应用指导原则》发布
